description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bald head, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is shirtless, revealing a defined chest and abdominal muscles, and wears fitted pants that reach just below the knees. His forearms and hands are covered with long gloves or sleeves, and he has tall boots that extend up to the lower part of his knees. The figure's skin is smooth and unblemished, and the overall appearance suggests a modern or slightly futuristic urban style. There are no visible accessories or carried objects, and the figure's posture is neutral and balanced.
description: A bald, muscular adult male in fitted pants, long gloves, and tall boots, standing upright with a neutral posture. The figure is shirtless, with defined musculature and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the defined chest, abdominal muscles, and facial features, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, chest, and the length of the gloves and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, the fit of the pants, and the back of the boots and gloves.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, similar to the left side, with clear visibility of the gloves and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted pants, long gloves or sleeves, tall boots
